channel.title: Indexing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Indexing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Content Understanding chunking and image verbalization in Azure AI Search
item.description:
Azure AI Search public preview adds Content Understanding chunking and image verbalization to the built-in indexing skill. Indexers can now split documents into semantically meaningful chunks and generate text from images during parsing.

  • Source: Azure Updates
